name: 雾之大陆(TheLandOfFog)
developer: 重庆泽斯塔沃夫软件开发有限公司
publisher: 重庆泽斯塔沃夫软件开发有限公司
short_description: Game type: turn based strategy action bar mode Rich plot, diverse skills, players play as several mercenaries, use strategies to challenge various levels, gradually unravel the fog of the Mist Continent, and complete their legends
detailed_description:
The plot is a story that takes place in the Mist Continent, and tells the legend of several mercenary companions. Players play as several mercenaries and use strategies to challenge various levels, gradually unraveling the fog of the Mist Continent and completing their legends

The game mode is War Chess mode

Unlike traditional chess, this game takes real-time actions except when the player executes commands

Action bar mode, each character can move when the action bar is full, and the action bar also moves when moving. The skill has forward and backward shaking, and there is a chance to interrupt or avoid enemy attacks

There are also distinctive elements such as terrain destruction and collaborative attacks

30+main level and 10+side level

20+professions, transfer system and six dimensional growth system to cultivate one's unique role

There are hundreds of unique skills and buffs combined

Many elite monsters and bosses are waiting for players to challenge, with unique boss skills.

synopsis

On the mysterious land of fog, there are four kingdoms with different shapes and colors: Fog, Work, Magic, and Wrestle.

After a long struggle, the four countries tend towards peace and stability.

At the urging of the great sage of the State of Fog, the four major powers decided to hold a conference every four years—— The Conference of Fog.

The conference aims to jointly summarize the development and changes of the past four years, and discuss in this context the trade, taxation, resource development, and other important affairs of various countries in the next four years.

The mutation occurred in 190 AD……

Officials from various countries were killed during the 32nd Quad Conference. Since then, rifts have emerged in the relationships among the four countries, and suspicion has slowly grown among them……
